chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application No.265 of 2013 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Hearing of case [Priority] 1. For hearing of main case 2. For hearing of CMA No.1594 of 2013 25.02.2025 Ms. Masooda Siraj, Advocate for the Applicant ************ Applicant’s Counsel, under instructions, submits that she is not aware as to whether order in question has been implemented or not. She was directed to assist Court on 11.02.2025. In view of such position, this Reference Application is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Qurban/PA*
